channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Housing insecurity is associated with increased risk of geriatric conditions and mortality
item.description: 1. Poor housing affordability and poor housing quality were associated with the development of geriatric conditions and mortality over 5 years. Eviden...

item.title: Metformin's real power may be in the gut
item.description: For decades, physicians and scientists thought metformin, the leading type 2 diabetes medication taken by millions worldwide, mainly targets the liver...

item.title: Metastatic Cancer Survival Gains Vary by Malignancy Type
item.description: Researchers analyzed population-based data of 11,864 patients diagnosed with de novo metastatic cancer in 1976 and 26,324 patients diagnosed in 2015, ...

item.title: Nutrition as Therapy: ESPEN Puts Patients First
item.description: ESPEN’s new ethics guide reframes medical nutrition as a clinical intervention, urging clinicians to prioritize patient dignity, informed consent, and...
